title: EXCLUSIVE
aboutShort: Premium media platform delivering original reporting and analysis on business, politics, technology, and regional affairs across Africa.

children.text: Exclusive (EX) is a pan-African premium media institution producing original reporting, analysis, and thought leadership on power, markets, technology, and regional transformation.

newsletterCopy: Get weekly analysis on business, politics, and technology across Africa.

title: Business
description: Markets, investment, trade, energy, and corporate strategy across Africa and frontier economies.

title: Politics
description: Governance, diplomacy, conflict, and regional strategy shaping Africa’s political economy.

title: Technology
description: Digital governance, AI, cybersecurity, telecom, and innovation in Africa’s emerging digital order.

title: Africa
description: Regional hub covering political economy, integration, markets, and diplomacy across the continent.

title: Policy
description: In-depth coverage on governance, reforms, and international relations (Micheal News category).

children.text: Senior Editor covering Ethiopian economic policy and frontier markets.

title: Ethiopia’s Banking Reform Tests Foreign Capital Strategy
dek: A new policy shift opens the financial sector to foreign participation, but structural risk, regulation, and political economy will determine whether capital follows reform.

title: Market Reform and Political Risk in Ethiopia
dek: A discussion on how policy reform, capital flows, and political economy intersect in frontier markets.

title: Ethiopia’s Digital Governance and AI Strategy
abstract: This publication examines Ethiopia’s emerging digital governance framework, artificial intelligence adoption, and implications for sovereignty, markets, and security.
